title: Federation Mirror Schema (EVID:FED)
description: Schema for bridging satellite repository state into the central registry.

satellite_id.description: Canonical identifier for the source satellite repository.

satellite_root.description: File system path to the satellite root.

satellite_loop_id.description: The loop ID associated with the mirrored state.

state_hash.description: The SHA-256 stable state hash from the satellite.

captured_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the mirror was captured.

trust.description: Trust level of the mirrored data.

source_peer_file.description: The specific peers.md file that cataloged this satellite.
